reviews.review_description: I use this when i have free time or when i don’t want to waste ammo! Its really good for practicing common IPSC/USPSA, Steel Challenge setups and volleys. It has the best feeling guns and honestly even without the recoil this is good for building up your draw and sight acquisition!

Few glitches in the game, including no long gun shooting for the lefties… except if you improvise by holding the gun like a girl. No offence ladies😇
Awesome experience and very realistic though. 
Come on guys - get a left handed developer to assist 😜

As an IPSC Shooter it is always nice to be able to practice at home. Dry fire is one thing but this app allows you to go one step further and easily test various stages and have fun. It is a great project and I give 5 stars because it deserves it but foremost to encourage the developers who are really engaged with this project. I can not wait for the future improvements and releases :) Great Job

Purchased a Quest 2 specifically to practice for USPSA competitions.  Excellent realistic feel and there are a few classifiers to practice on.  Highly recommended for training purposes and hours of fun!

reviews.review_title: A must have for a USPSA/IPSC competitoe
reviews.review_description:
I'm a USPSA and 3gun guy. Going deeply into the Action sports, a lot of what ifs in stage planning and what yields the best results. When it comes to hit factor scoring, things get a little more intricate. Using this app, I have been able to simulate scenarios in stage planning and subsequently deepen my intuitive understanding of what works best for me. On top of that, intermediate and above shooters who already know how to shoot (roughly high B-class and up) will find that this game is capable of assisting in breaking through plateaus. Eye speed, reaction time, and even fast trigger resetting can be practiced in the game. 

Also, number one reason to get the game? i get to shoot matches in my living room!

This shooting simulator it’s great ! Guns mechanics are really good and had everything that you can expect from a soothing range experience. My favorite feature it’s the virtual (pact club shot timer) to really improve you time and speed.

developer_response.body: Thanks Joe! Please visit the discord channel @ discord.me/blobworks if you would like any features or have any other feedback, we are very active on there!

reviews.review_description: can someone explain to me what the "procedural penalties" are? I wish there was a more in depth explanation for everything. otherwise tons of fun and exactly what I hoped it would be!!

The absolute worst most glitchy app on this platform period. Wish I would have fully read the refund policy, stupid me I kept trying to get it to work. Should’ve just requested refund after the first 5 min.
it is good

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! Glad you enjoy, please join our discord server @ discord.me/blobworks if you would like your suggestions / ideas considered :)

reviews.review_description: Thank you for providing an awesome experience.

developer_response.body: Hello. Sorry the instruction was not clear enough. You have to select a firearm from the table, equip and lock it in place before proceeding to other area as mentioned in both the end of the training section and the FAQ within the main menu. Please re-consider your rating once you have a chance to try this.

reviews.review_description: Love the app, but i wish they could add IDPA/USPSA silhouette target option on the custom stage instead of just all steel target

I had problems the first time trying this. There were long guns, but no pistols. This time, i have pistols and i can shoot at ranges. How do i get the long guns to appear. 

I found a tutorial, and has cleared up a lot of misunderstandings on my end.  I am beging to understand how do the proper steps to select ranges, and this has increased my enjoyment in this app. It is quickly becoming part of my rotation of my library in the top 2-3 rows. 
  
Also thank you for responding so quickly.

Alright, so this is all worth reading so far, i hope. I have since gone back and did what you suggested for ‘2 hands/1hand” in settings: it worked. I have bumped this up to 4 stars for sure, because once i did what was needed, the desired effect happened.  
Here are some thoughts for possible improvement:
I also enjoy the 2 liter bottles, and flower pots to shoot at. I rather enjoy the “animal shadows” cutouts.  More of them would help.

if i can figure out how to get the ok on most of the comp ranges, i will give it 5 stars. 
i have tried the discord, and it keeps saying invite expired.

developer_response.body: Hello, not sure why the discord.me/blobworks link is not working for you, could you get in touch with me on Facebook? Thanks!

reviews.review_description: A literal hidden gem within the VR space. The one handed control is very different but extremely intuitive, it feels real. This game can easily be used as a training aid, bad habits can develop so be aware. However, its a slightly worse, but more fun dry firing aid. 9.5 out of 10 as there are some non-game breaking bugs, and you have to do your target settings, everytime you boot up the game. Don't let that turn you off from this game, its great.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words, I see that you've already joined the Discord, welcome! :)

reviews.review_description: This game is the closest thing to competition shooting or even regular practical shooting practice on Q2. Guns work great and are customizable, and has multiple game modes. Very realistic but also has alot more future potential.

developer_response.body: Feel free to join the discord server for any feedback / suggestion, recently we also opened the ability to share custom stages you've made and you can see what other users have made by loading them into your game @ discord.me/blobworks

reviews.review_description: Well detailed firearms with good mechanics, and lots of stages. I also love the references to shooting ranges popular YouTubers use. Solid so far, and keen to see how it further develops.

reviews.review_title: Very good tool for winter months
reviews.review_description: Very nice, sight picture is spot on. Takes time to learn all the controls but overall very good. 5 stages have places where you get stuck, usually with gun on a table start and range comands get stuck as well sometimes, but holstering your gun and drawing it again and taking off your safety usually works. Shotgun stage is brilliant

reviews.review_title: Blue print training on another level
reviews.review_description:
This is a must have for any civilian or professional that takes their responsibility to hold a firearm seriously. If you cant get to the range but want daily training, this is low cost high value reward. You want to test your capabilities, you want to see how you handle high stress engagements. Add workouts with couses of action and push to the limts without the safety concerns of live fire exercises. 

This app/training tool gives you the ability to create your own courses of fire, build shoot houses and run drills until you are happy with your effective efficiency.

 Did you want to build a room thats left fed and work out all the possibilities, then a right fed or a centre fed…. then add an opening or a second activated target? You can have it all at home with the room scale movement capability. You can now work 360 without the safety concerns and without the need of multiple people to help. 

Training the basics, putting them together at speed and building enviroments that test skills and develop proficiency. This is a great training tool from biginner to professional! You will benifit from applying this as another tool to be the best you can.
This game shows great potential. However the loading of the handgun appears to be impossible

I've been shooting competitively for 5+ years and this app has done more for my stage plans than 5 years of dry fire and basement practice ever could.   The drills have  helped me work through efficiency issues while providing as close to real world feedback as possible.  I've recommended this app to all of my shooting friends and match organizers that I work with.   This tool gives me the ability to get the idea out of my head then test fire/proof the stage for safety and flow.

This is an amazing tool and well worth every penny!

This is an awesome game!!!! This is a great way to get your USPSA practice in when you can’t make it to the range.  Practice your time and accuracy.  Choose between day and night shoot.  There is also a discord site you can join and shoot with others.  This game is definitely worth it for sports shooters.
